nasb.text: and had commanded him concerning this thing, that he should not go after other gods; but he did not observe what the Lord had commanded.

esv.text: and had commanded him concerning this thing, that he should not go after other gods. But he did not keep what the Lord commanded.

cnv.text: 耶和華為了這事曾經吩咐他，不可隨從別的神，可是他沒有遵守耶和華吩咐的。
